title: Paddle provider config
description: Configuration shape for a Paddle Classic + Paddle Billing integration. Paddle is a Merchant of Record — Paddle handles taxes + chargebacks + VAT remittance. All credentials encrypted at rest.

api_key.description: Paddle Billing v2 API key. Encrypted at rest.

webhook_secret.description: Paddle Notification webhook signing secret. Used to verify inbound webhook signatures (Paddle-Signature header).

environment.description: Paddle environment. production = api.paddle.com; sandbox = sandbox-api.paddle.com.

public_key.description: Optional Paddle Classic public key (RSA — for legacy Classic webhook verification). Only required for tenants using Paddle Classic. Encrypted at rest.

notification_id.description: Paddle Notification setting ID that binds to this tenant's webhook endpoint. Populated automatically after first webhook setup.
